---
title: "ITP-Shopify Store - Assignment 3 - Product Catalog Development"
author: "Julie Diaz"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-expand: true
    number-sections: true
    code-link: true
    embed-resources: true
    code-tools: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    theme: flatly
    css: styles.css
editor: visual
execute: 
  freeze: auto
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
```

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
This report documents the product catalog development for **Juke Vintage**, a secondhand and vintage clothing resale store built on Shopify for ITP Assignment 3.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Product List {#sec-product-list}

The following 10 products were added to the Juke Vintage Shopify store. All products are sourced from real inventory listed on Depop under the username **jukedz**.

| \# | Product Title | Price | Category | Condition |
|----|----|----|----|----|
| 1 | Coach Signature Shoulder Bag | \$210.70 | Shoulder Bags / Handbags | Like new |
| 2 | Nike Women's Brown and Tan Trainers | \$68.95 | Sneakers / Shoes | Like new |
| 3 | Women's Brown and Tan Boots | \$26.95 | Boots / Shoes | Like new |
| 4 | Women's Argyle Sweater Vest | \$53.20 | Vests / Outerwear | Excellent |
| 5 | Women's Multi Vest (Tank Top) | \$14.35 | Tank Tops / Clothing Tops | Like new |
| 6 | Alo Yoga Love Is Love Tote Bag | \$53.20 | Tote Bags / Luggage & Bags | Brand new |
| 7 | Dr. Martens Black Mary Jane Shoes | \$80.00 | Shoes / Apparel & Accessories | Like new |
| 8 | Alo Yoga Women's Black Top | \$26.95 | Sports Bras / Activewear | Like new |
| 9 | Princess Polly Blue and Navy Dress | \$18.55 | Dresses / Clothing | Like new |
| 10 | Yellow Trim Patchwork Tote Bag | \$47.95 | Tote Bags / Luggage & Bags | Excellent |

: Juke Vintage — Full Product List {#tbl-products}

See @tbl-products above for a summary of all 10 products.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Product Information Evidence {#sec-evidence}

The following screenshots show each product's admin page in Shopify, including title, description, price, image, category, vendor, and tags.

## Overview — All Products {#sec-overview}

<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Shopify Products Admin — Full Product List View" style="width:100%;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(180,100,120,0.15);margin:1rem auto;display:block;"/>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Individual Product Pages {#sec-individual}

::: panel-tabset
### Coach Bag

<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Coach Signature Shoulder Bag" style="width:90%;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(180,100,120,0.15);margin:1rem auto;display:block;"/>

**Title:** Coach Signature Shoulder Bag\
**Price:** \$210.70\
**Category:** Shoulder Bags in Handbags\
**Vendor:** Juke Vintage\
**Tags:** Shoulder Bag, Designer, Coach\
**Description:** Brown Coach Signature canvas shoulder bag with gold hardware. Bought brand new and only used a couple of times — a timeless, structured bag that elevates any outfit. Adjustable strap, zip closure, signature monogram canvas.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Nike Trainers

<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Nike Women&apos;s Brown and Tan Trainers" style="width:90%;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(180,100,120,0.15);margin:1rem auto;display:block;"/>

**Title:** Nike Women's Brown and Tan Trainers\
**Price:** \$68.95\
**Category:** Sneakers in Shoes\
**Vendor:** Juke Vintage\
**Tags:** Sneakers, Nike, AirForce1\
**Description:** Nike Air Force 1 Low '07 in an acorn/tan colorway. Only worn once — a versatile neutral sneaker that pairs easily with both casual and elevated looks.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Brown Boots

<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Women&apos;s Brown and Tan Boots" style="width:90%;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(180,100,120,0.15);margin:1rem auto;display:block;"/>

**Title:** Women's Brown and Tan Boots\
**Price:** \$26.95\
**Category:** Boots in Shoes\
**Vendor:** Juke Vintage\
**Tags:** Faux Leather, Boots, Biker Boots\
**Description:** Brown faux leather biker boots with buckle detail at the ankle. New, no box — a versatile boot that works for both everyday wear and a more edgy outfit.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Sweater Vest

<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Women&apos;s Argyle Sweater Vest" style="width:90%;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(180,100,120,0.15);margin:1rem auto;display:block;"/>

**Title:** Women's Argyle Sweater Vest\
**Price:** \$53.20\
**Category:** Vests in Outerwear\
**Vendor:** Juke Vintage\
**Tags:** Sweater Vest, Merino Wool, Light Academia\
**Description:** Light academia-style sweater vest in black and brown argyle, 100% merino wool by Black Brown 1826. Has a small stitched repair spot in the back, otherwise excellent condition. A cozy, classic layering piece with an Italian-made wool quality feel.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Tank Top

<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Women&apos;s Multi Vest Tank Top" style="width:90%;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(180,100,120,0.15);margin:1rem auto;display:block;"/>

**Title:** Women's Multi Vest (Tank Top)\
**Price:** \$14.35\
**Category:** Tank Tops in Clothing Tops\
**Vendor:** Juke Vintage\
**Tags:** Tank Top, Graphic Tee, Basics\
**Description:** Black cotton tank top with "Luckiest Girl in the World" script lettering across the front. A simple, versatile basic with a fun graphic detail — easy to dress up or down.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Alo Tote

<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Alo Yoga Love Is Love Tote Bag" style="width:90%;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(180,100,120,0.15);margin:1rem auto;display:block;"/>

**Title:** Alo Yoga Love Is Love Tote Bag\
**Price:** \$53.20\
**Category:** Tote Bags in Luggage & Bags\
**Vendor:** Juke Vintage\
**Tags:** Tote Bag, Pride Collection, Alo Yoga\
**Description:** Alo Yoga 2021 "Love Is Love" collection tote in a multicolored camo-and-paint-splatter design. Brand new, never used, no tags. A statement piece that doubles as a gym bag or everyday tote.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Dr. Martens

<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Dr. Martens Black Mary Jane Shoes" style="width:90%;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(180,100,120,0.15);margin:1rem auto;display:block;"/>

**Title:** Dr. Martens Black Mary Jane Shoes\
**Price:** \$80.00\
**Category:** Shoes in Apparel & Accessories\
**Vendor:** Juke Vintage\
**Tags:** Mary Jane, Leather Shoes, Dr.Martens\
**Description:** Black Dr. Martens 8065 leather Mary Jane shoes with signature yellow stitching. Worn once — a durable, classic silhouette that pairs well with both casual and dressier outfits.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Alo Sports Bra

<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Alo Yoga Women&apos;s Black Top" style="width:90%;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(180,100,120,0.15);margin:1rem auto;display:block;"/>

**Title:** Alo Yoga Women's Black Top\
**Price:** \$26.95\
**Category:** Sports Bras in Activewear\
**Vendor:** Juke Vintage\
**Tags:** Sports Bra, Alo Yoga, Active wear\
**Description:** Alo Yoga black sports bra with signature logo detail. A versatile activewear staple, equally suited for workouts or layered under an open top.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Princess Polly Dress

<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Princess Polly Blue and Navy Dress" style="width:90%;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(180,100,120,0.15);margin:1rem auto;display:block;"/>

**Title:** Princess Polly Blue and Navy Dress\
**Price:** \$18.55\
**Category:** Dresses in Clothing\
**Vendor:** Juke Vintage\
**Tags:** Princess Polly, Preppy, Dress\
**Description:** Navy blue dress with scalloped trim detail. Only worn once — a preppy, lightweight dress perfect for warm weather or a casual day out.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Patchwork Tote

<img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Yellow Trim Patchwork Tote Bag" style="width:90%;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(180,100,120,0.15);margin:1rem auto;display:block;"/>

**Title:** Yellow Trim Patchwork Tote Bag\
**Price:** \$47.95\
**Category:** Tote Bags in Luggage & Bags\
**Vendor:** Juke Vintage\
**Tags:** Tote, Patchwork, Handmade, Cottagecore\
**Description:** Handmade patchwork tote bag with a cheerful mix of cottagecore-inspired prints and a bright yellow trim. A one-of-a-kind accessory for anyone who loves a maximalist, handmade aesthetic.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Assortment Strategy Reflection {#sec-assortment}

::: {.callout-tip title="Assortment Strategy"}
The Juke Vintage assortment is built around versatile, mix-and-match secondhand pieces rather than one-off statement items, since the target customer is shopping to build out a personal, sustainable wardrobe rather than purchasing a single look. Footwear like the Dr. Martens Mary Janes, Nike trainers, and biker boots provide everyday foundational pieces, while accessories like the Coach shoulder bag, Alo Yoga tote, and patchwork tote give the customer options across price points and aesthetics — from elevated designer to handmade and eclectic. Tops and dresses such as the argyle sweater vest, graphic tank, sports bra, and Princess Polly dress round out the assortment with pieces that can be layered or styled in multiple ways. Together, the products reflect a curated but eclectic resale aesthetic, mixing recognizable brand names (Coach, Nike, Dr. Martens, Alo Yoga) with more individual, handmade items, which builds trust with shoppers while still giving the store a distinct point of view.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# CPP Farm Store Application Reflection {#sec-cpp}

::: {.callout-note title="CPP Farm Store Considerations"}
CPP Farm Store should consider that, much like a resale shop, customer trust online depends heavily on clear, honest product details since shoppers cannot physically inspect the item before purchasing. Each product listing should include specific details such as condition, size or quantity, ingredients or contents where relevant, and availability (in stock, seasonal, or pickup-only) — similar to how each Juke Vintage listing specifies condition and size up front. Organizing products into clear categories, rather than one long list, would also help customers browse with intention, whether they are looking for a specific gift type or simply exploring what is available. Finally, presenting a mix of staple everyday items alongside a few standout or seasonal products would help CPP Farm Store build the same kind of curated, trustworthy online presence that keeps customers coming back to check what is new.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Appendix {#sec-appendix}

> Links will be added once the project is published to GitHub Pages.

-   **GitHub Page:** [jukedz.github.io/ITP](https://jukedz.github.io/ITP) *(update with assign3 URL after publishing)*
-   **GitHub Repo:** [github.com/jukedz/ITP](https://github.com/jukedz/ITP)

[^1]

[^1]: All product images and details are sourced from the author's personal Depop shop (jukedz) and used here for educational purposes only.
